explanation: High-attendance music festival with strong food vendor demand and outdoor setup. Excellent foot traffic for hot food sales.
Food festival means heavy competition from similar vendors. Expect saturation but steady crowd exposure for the right menu.
County fair draws diverse crowds over multiple days. Hot food vendors typically do well with consistent midway traffic.
Cultural festival attracts families who spend on food. Moderate attendance with good vendor diversity and community vibe.
Rodeo crowds are hungry but spread out over large grounds. Hot food does well near main arena; positioning matters.
